title: The Dragon Festival
content:
Every year, the Yan Kingdom held a Dragon Festival to celebrate the bond between dragons and humans.

This year, the festival was bigger than ever, with dragons from all over the world in attendance.

"Father," Yan Chen said. "Can I participate in the dragon race?"

Yan Long nodded. "Yes. But be careful."

***

The dragon race was a grand event, with dragons flying through the sky, competing for the prize.

Yan Chen transformed into his dragon form, and he joined the race.

The crowd cheered as the dragons took off, flying through the sky at incredible speeds.

Yan Chen was fast, but there was one dragon who was faster - a young dragon from the Western Kingdom named Long Wei.

They flew side by side, neither of them gaining the upper hand.

Finally, Yan Chen saw an opening. He used his dragon fire to boost his speed, and he crossed the finish line first.

"He won!" the crowd cheered.

***

After the race, Yan Chen met Long Wei.

"You're fast," Long Wei said, smiling.

Yan Chen nodded. "You too."

They talked for a while, and Yan Chen learned that Long Wei was the prince of the Western Kingdom.

"Maybe we can be friends," Yan Chen said.

Long Wei smiled. "I'd like that."

***

That night, the Dragon Festival continued with a grand feast. Dragons and humans ate together, and there was music and dancing.

"This is amazing," Lin Xue said, looking at the crowd.

Yan Long nodded. "It is."

He put his arm around her, and they watched the festivities together.

For a moment, everything felt perfect.

And Yan Long knew that this was just the beginning.

The dragon prince had created a world where dragons and humans could live in peace, and he was proud of what he had accomplished.

The end... for now.
